# Phylo — Biomni Lab

**Source:** phylo.bio · 2026 (company homepage)

> Thin source — marketing homepage, not technical docs. Captured as a landscape reference for AI-agent platforms in biology.

## TL;DR

Phylo is a startup offering **Biomni Lab**, billed as "the first Integrated Biology Environment" — a collaborative workspace where biomedical researchers work alongside AI agents to "make more discoveries, faster."

## Key claims

- Positions an **agentic, collaborative workbench** for general biomedical research (not specialized to one subdomain despite the "phylo" name).
- **Enterprise posture:** ISO 27001 certified, SOC 2 Type 2 compliant — pitched on protecting research data.
- **Funding:** seed round co-led by **a16z and Menlo Ventures**.
- Free trial of Biomni Lab; published a vision doc on AI agents reshaping biology workflows.
